title: Agentic Mermaid StyleSpec
description: A partial declarative style record for Agentic Mermaid rendering. All fields, including formatVersion, are optional on input; resolved and registered specs normalize formatVersion to 1.

formatVersion.description: Persisted wire-format version. Optional on input and normalized to 1 on output.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema pointer for file-backed styles; ignored while rendering.

name.description: Canonical look:name or palette:name identity; required only when registering a style.

blurb.description: Short human-readable description used by discovery surfaces.

colors.description: Partial palette of safe, non-fetching CSS color tokens. Runtime validation applies the stricter safe-color policy.

bg.description: Diagram page background. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

fg.description: Primary text and foreground paint. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

line.description: Connector and secondary line paint. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

accent.description: Accent paint for emphasis and data series. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

muted.description: Muted text and secondary data paint. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

surface.description: Node and group surface fill. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

border.description: Node and group border paint. Must be a safe, non-fetching CSS color.

font.description: Safe, non-fetching CSS font family or stack; the rendering environment supplies the font face.

stroke.description: Stroke treatment; crisp is the default renderer.

passes.description: Number of sketch strokes; 1 is single-pass and 2 is the usual double stroke.

strokeWidth.description: Base stroke width in SVG user units.

fill.description: Fill treatment; sketch backends interpret hachure and wash.

backdrop.description: Flat page furniture drawn behind the diagram.

intent.description: Advisory intent metadata for pickers and quality tooling.

mono.description: Advisory monochrome contract: express tone through shading and weight.
